comments.comment:
Would you like to create an exemption record for this ON MOE TRA substance? *

The above question was incorrectly answered 'no' during the preparation of the 2013 annual SWIM report.  The Facility is below the LOQ for Dioxins and Furans and would like to create an exemption record.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 2009 production was lower than in 2008.  Emission calculated using USEPA AP42 emissions factors.  A new baghouse was installed which greatly reduced particulate emissions from kiln 3, however, AP42 emission factors are higher for fabric filters than ESPs

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Much lower production in 2009 compared to 2008.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Production was much lower in 2009 than 2008.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Production in 2008 was significantly higher than in 2009.  Additionally, several millions of dollars were spent upgrading the particulate control systems on kiln 3 with the replacement of an ESP with a baghouse.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 2009 production was much lower than 2008.  In addition, pollution control equipment on kiln 3 was upgraded with the replacement of the feed end ESP with a baghouse.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Production levels were much lower in 2009 than 2008.  Additionally, a new baghouse was installed on kiln 3 feed end which is much more efficient at capturing PM2.5 than the old ESP.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Small changes to burning conditions on both kilns reduced emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Stack tests for this compound all returned results below detection limit.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changed operating conditions to reduce emissions of SO2.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Stacktest results showed that Essroc's previous emission estimates were far too high.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Stack tests showed that emissions from one of our stacks was higher than previously believed.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changed emission estimates to better reflect average plant conditions, rather than assuming plant constantly runs at worst case emission levels.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The oxidation of SO2 to SO3 leading to the formation of H2SO4 is highly dependent on the excess oxygen & temperature of the gas stream.Most Cement plants have excess O2 concentrations that hinder or prevent the oxidaton of SO2 to SO3.Further, Cement plant
